title: Su mejor alumno
writer: Homero Manzi, Ulises Petit de Murat, Domingo F. Sarmiento
actors: Enrique Muiño, Ángel Magaña, Orestes Caviglia
plot: The film tells the story of the natural son of a former president of Argentina and father of public education in the country, Domingo Faustino Sarmiento, named Domingo, according to the first autobiographical accounts.
